_comment: AstraSec Events — each entry maps to one EventCard on the Events page. 'cat' is used for filter buttons. 'iconPath' is an SVG path d= value. 'day' and 'venue' are shown as metadata.

events.title: CAPTURE THE FLAG
events.description: The ultimate test of your hacking skills. Find vulnerabilities, exploit them, and capture the flag before time runs out.

events.title: MALWARE ANALYSIS
events.description: Hands-on session on reverse engineering and analyzing modern malware strains using industry standard tools.

events.title: FUTURE OF CRYPTOGRAPHY
events.description: A deep dive into post-quantum cryptography and how it will shape the future of secure communications.

events.title: WEB EXPLOITATION
events.description: Find and report vulnerabilities in provided web applications. High severity bugs win premium bounties.

events.title: ATTACK & DEFEND
events.description: Form teams to attack opponent infrastructure while defending your own in a simulated enterprise environment.

events.title: CLOUD SECURITY
events.description: Learn how to secure AWS and Azure environments against common misconfigurations and attack vectors.
